message.content:
@startuml
title 蓝牙配网-搜索流程

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #333333
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #999999
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #F7F7F7
  BoxBorderColor #999999
  BoxBackgroundColor #EFEFEF
  GroupBorderColor #999999
  GroupBackgroundColor #F3F3F3
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #999999
}

actor "调用" as Caller

box "sdk_client" #EDEDED
participant "IotRecorderManager" as IotRecorderManager
participant "DevicesManagerMachine" as DevicesManagerMachine
participant "BlueDiscoveryControl" as BlueDiscoveryControl
participant "BlueBondControl" as BlueBondControl
participant "BleScanControl" as BleScanControl
participant "BluetoothGattConfig" as BluetoothGattConfig
end box

participant "WifiManagerMachine" as WifiManagerMachine
participant "BluetoothPanConfig" as BluetoothPanConfig
participant "WifiPortalControl" as WifiPortalControl

box "" #FFFFFF
participant "BluetoothAdapter" as BluetoothAdapter
participant "BluetoothDevice" as BluetoothDevice
participant "BluetoothGatt" as BluetoothGatt
participant "WifiList" as WifiList
end box

== 初始化 ==
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : InitState.enter
note left of DevicesManagerMachine
InitState
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl : registerReceiver

== 搜索设备 ==
Caller -> DevicesManagerMachine : startDiscoveryDevice
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : startDiscoveryDevice
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : InitState --> DiscoveryState
note left of DevicesManagerMachine
InitState --> DiscoveryState
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : CMD_DISCOVERY_START
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : DiscoveryState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl : registerReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : new DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl : startDiscovery
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter : startDiscovery

BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : sendMessage
note left of DevicesManagerMachine
BluetoothDevice.ACTION_FOUND
MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> Caller : MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND\n<返回扫描到的蓝牙设备：BluetoothDevice>

== 绑定设备 ==
Caller -> DevicesManagerMachine : BondDevice
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : BondDevice
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : CMD_BOND_DEVICE
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl : cancelDiscovery
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter : cancelDiscovery
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueBondControl : bondDevice
BlueBondControl -> BluetoothDevice : createBond
BlueBondControl -> BlueBondControl : BondBroadcastReceiver

DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : DiscoveryState --> BondedState
note left of DevicesManagerMachine
DiscoveryState --> BondedState
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : BondedState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> Caller : MSG_BOND_SUCCESS\n<返回绑定成功>

== 建立GATT连接 ==
Caller -> DevicesManagerMachine : connectGatt
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : connectGatt
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : CMD_CONNECT_GATT
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : BondedState --> BleScanState
note left of DevicesManagerMachine
BondedState --> BleScanState
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : BleScanState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> BleScanControl : StartLeScan
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter : getBluetoothLeScanner.startScan
BleScanControl -> BleScanControl : ScanCallback.onScanResult
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter : getBluetoothLeScanner.stopScan

BleScanControl -> BluetoothGattConfig : connect
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothDevice : connectGatt
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGatt : bluetoothGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt : discoverServices
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
发现服务后会回调onServicesDiscovered，
以及之后订阅的特征值变化通知
end note
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGattConfig : onServicesDiscovered
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt : setCharacteristicNotification
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
拿到需要的服务和特征
end note

DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_GATT_CONNECTED
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : BleScanState --> GattConnectedState
note left of DevicesManagerMachine
BleScanState --> GattConnectedState
end note
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : GattConnectedState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> Caller : MSG_GATT_CONNECTED
DevicesManagerMachine -> Caller : MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED

== 启动WiFi配置 ==
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : new
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothPanConfig : new
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiPortalControl : new
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : start
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : IdleState --> WifiConfigState
note left of WifiManagerMachine
IdleState --> WifiConfigState
end note
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : CMD_START

== 同步wifi状态 ==
Caller -> WifiManagerMachine : syncWifiState
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : syncWifiState
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : CMD_SYNC_WIFI_STATE
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : syncWifiState
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristic  CMD_GET_WIFI_STATE
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt : writeCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
向服务端写入请求
end note

BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGattConfig : onCharacteristicChanged\n_UUID_WIFI_STATE
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
message.what = DevicesManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_STATE\nmessage.arg1 = WifiManagerMachine.WIFI_STATE\nmessage.arg2 = WifiManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_ON\nmessage.obj = new String(characteristic.getValue())
end note
BluetoothGattConfig -> DevicesManagerMachine : processMessage
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : processMessage

note right of WifiManagerMachine
message.what = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE\nmessage.arg1 = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE_ON\nmClientHandler.sendMessage(message)
end note

== 打开wifi开关 ==
Caller -> WifiManagerMachine : setWifiState
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : setWifiState
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : SetWifiState
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristic  CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt : writeCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
向服务端写入请求
end note

== wifiScan ==
Caller -> WifiManagerMachine : wifiScan
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : wifiScan
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : CMD_SCAN_WIFI_LIST
WifiManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : setUuidRequestScan
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristic  CMD_GET_SCAN_WIFILIST
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt : writeCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
向服务端写入请求
end note

BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGattConfig : _UUID_WIFI_ACCESSPOINT\n<sendwifilist <- SCAN_RESULTS_AVAILABLE_ACTION>
BluetoothGattConfig -> WifiList : updateAccessPoints

@enduml
